series_metadata.series_title: Unemployment Compensation Benefits Payment Warrant Register
series_metadata.series_description: This file is a daily detailed listing (generated by MIS) of warrants cut on the previous day for payment of UC benefits. Information includes, but is not limited to, claimant’s name, social security number, fund monies taken from, amount of warrant, warrant number, date warrant issued and listing of canceled warrants. Treasurer of State images the warrants and the hard copy checks are sent to the records center to be retained for 90 days. A listing of these warrants, including the claimant’s name, SS#, warrant# and amount is also available on- line at their web-site via the Internet.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: warrant registers in office provided audited by Auditor of State, audit report released and all discrepancies are resolved. canceled/cleared warrant 90 days received back from State Treasurer of Ohio. ; Microform: 5 years, series no longer filmed
